text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, March 27. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing our household budget today. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that calculating some savings estimates. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
